# Krea MCP Server

> MCP server for Krea.ai - Generate AI images and videos

## What is this?

An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that connects Claude, Cursor, and other AI assistants to Krea.ai's image and video generation API.

## Installation

```bash
npm install -g krea-mcp
```

## Configuration

Set KREA_API_KEY environment variable with your Krea API key.

For Claude Desktop, add to config:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "krea": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["krea-mcp"],
      "env": {
        "KREA_API_KEY": "your-key"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Tools

- generate_image: Create images from text (Flux, Ideogram, Imagen, etc.)
- generate_video: Create videos from text or images (Hailuo, Runway, Kling, etc.)
- get_job: Check generation status
- list_jobs: List recent jobs
- upload_asset: Upload images for use in generations
- search_styles: Find styles/LoRAs

## Supported Models

Image: flux-dev, flux-pro, ideogram-v2, imagen-4, krea-1
Video: hailuo, kling-1.6, runway-gen4, pika-2, veo-3

## Links

- Docs: https://github.com/keugenek/krea-mcp
- Krea API: https://docs.krea.ai
- MCP: https://modelcontextprotocol.io
